FOR ACCOUNTING

Your AI Associate
on the Engagement Team

From trial balances to board-ready reports, Associum compresses days of testing, reconciliation, and write-up into hours, without cutting corners on accuracy or professional standards.

Start for Free Explore Enterprise Solutions

An AI-powered end-to-end workflow

Associum's agents manage the entire workflow of data analysis, testing, and documentation, from raw inputs to red flags, from analysis to a near-final deliverable.

01

Data Ingestion

Upload documents and datasets from any source. Associum reads, classifies, and enriches every file with third-party data and deep web research.

Unstructured → Understanding
02

Data Extraction

Key figures, test results, and findings are extracted and indexed, each traced to its exact source document and page.

Data → Evidence
03

Findings Synthesis

Findings are structured against the relevant risk assessment, control framework, or standard, calibrated to the output type.

Information → Insight
04

Document Generation

Associum produces a near-final working paper, report, or remediation plan, formatted and structured, ready for your review.

Insight → Draft
05

Review and Sign off

Refine the output in-platform. Verify the conclusions, apply firm conventions. Every element is editable before it leaves your hands.

Draft → Decision
WHO IT IS FOR

Built for every accounting role.

Associum handles the work of different audit and assurance roles, each with distinct outputs and workflows.

AUDIT SERVICE

Review more sample documents, analyze the data at scale, and document the results and key issues in one workflow.

Associum reviews documents and data at scale, providing analytical inputs and generating draft working papers and client deliverables for your input and perspective.

WHAT ASSOCIUM HANDLES

  • Reads workpapers, trial balances, and supporting schedules.
  • Structures findings against the risk assessment and audit plan.
  • Drafts the working paper or memo, cross-referenced and cited.
  • You review and sign-off, applying your judgment, not your word processing skills.
SAMPLE OUTPUT
Audit Working Paper

Review-ready working paper from testing data to documented conclusion, fully cross-referenced.

SOURCE- TRUTH INSIGHT

Every number traces back to its source.

Associum does not generate figures from context or inference. Every data point in the output is extracted directly from the documents you uploaded, cited back to the exact page and section it came from.

Results from deep web research and third-party data sources are also integrated inline with documents for confirmation.

You review the work. You verify the sources. The judgment stays with you.

WORKFLOW AUTOMATION

The work Associum handles

Associum's agents manage the entire workflow of testing and documentation, helping you and your clients get assurance on key issues and complete audit cycles with better information, faster. The testing is your work. The write-up that follows is Associum's.

WITHOUT ASSOCIUM

You dive into data rooms, sample files, compare data, flag issues. You spend hours on work that doesn't scale."

Read every work paper Extract test results Cross-reference data sources Sample and review client documents Chase missing schedules Build the file structure Tie findings to key issues and risks Cross-reference every conclusion Tie out the numbers Rework after review notes
WITH ASSOCIUM

You provide direction and context. Associum handles the rest.

Testing review Synthesis Drafting Cross-referencing Formatting

You review the draft

Accurate, cited and ready for review

Confirmed results don't require weeks.

Upload your client documents and review them at scale. Review and compare original invoices or contracts with financial system extracts in minutes. Identify and summarise key issues in a near-final deliverable in under 30 minutes. You spend your time on the client interactions and judgment calls, not the documentation.

What it means across the engagement team

A associate's time saved on one file is useful. The same gain across every associate, on every engagement, changes the practice's economics. Associum's value compounds at the team and practice level, not just the individual one.

Collaboration

Higher

Associates collaborate in the same AI workspace, around the same inputs and deliverables. Productivity improves, and knowledge creation is captured on a single platform.

Turnaround

Faster

Files move from testing to manager review faster, shortening the engagement cycle.

Quality consistency

More consistent

Every associate's output follows the same firm template and standard, reducing review and rework cycles.

Capacity

Expanded

The same team takes on more engagements during peak season without proportional headcount growth.

This is a team-level lever, not just an individual productivity tool. Built for partners and practice leads evaluating impact across utilisation, margin, and engagement capacity.

Common Questions from Accounting Professionals

Yes. Associum is built to handle workpapers, trial balances, control matrices, valuation models, and supporting schedules. It reads the full document, not just the first few pages.

Every data point and claim in an Associum output is traced back to a specific source document, page, and section. If it can't find something in the documents you've uploaded, it won't invent it.

Associum is SOC 2 certified and ISO 27001 compliant. Your documents are never used to train any Al model. Data handling details are available on our Security page.

Most users have a structured first draft (working paper, remediation plan, or report) within 20-30 minutes of uploading their documents, depending on document volume.

No setup required. Upload your documents and start. For teams that want outputs in a specific house format, templates can be configured, but it works out of the box from day one.

Still have a question? Use the form on our Contact page and we'll be in touch within one business day.

From workshop notes to near-final deck.
In one environment.

Free to start. No credit card required.
